# Boring Tools

> Free online tools that run in your browser. Nothing to install, no sign-up.

Boring Tools is a collection of 24 browser-based utilities for developers, writers, and anyone who needs a quick conversion or generation task done. No data is sent to any server.

## Browse categories

- Text & Writing: Word Counter, Case Converter, Lorem Ipsum Generator
- Developer Tools: JSON Formatter, Base64, UUID, Timestamp, URL Encoder, Binary/Hex, JWT, Rot13, Markdown Preview, Regex Tester, CSV↔JSON, QR Code Generator, Cron Expression Generator, Protobuf Decoder, .gitignore Generator, Codebase Context Packer, Token Counter
- Converters: Unit Converter
- Security & Privacy: Password Generator, Hash Generator, HMAC Generator
- AI & Prompting: Token Counter, Codebase Context Packer

## Tools

### Text & Writing
- Word Counter: Count characters, words, sentences, lines and reading time live as you type.
- Case Converter: Convert text to UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case and more.
- Lorem Ipsum Generator: Generate 1-20 paragraphs of classic Lorem Ipsum placeholder text.

### Developer Tools
- JSON Formatter: Beautify, minify and validate JSON with clear error messages.
- Base64 Encode / Decode: Convert text to and from Base64 with full UTF-8 support for emoji and accented characters.
- UUID Generator: Generate random RFC 4122 v4 UUIDs using a cryptographically secure RNG.
- Timestamp Converter: Convert Unix timestamps to dates and back. Auto-detect seconds vs milliseconds.
- URL Encoder & Decoder: Encode and decode URLs with full UTF-8 support for international characters.
- Binary Decimal Hex Converter: Convert between binary, decimal, hexadecimal and octal instantly.
- JWT Decoder: Decode JWT tokens instantly — see header, payload and expiration.
- Rot13 & Caesar Cipher: Encode and decode Rot13, Caesar cipher with custom shift, and Atbash cipher.
- Markdown Preview Editor: Write Markdown and see a live rendered preview. Split-pane editor.
- Regex Tester & Debugger: Test regular expressions with live match highlighting and group capture details.
- CSV to JSON Converter: Convert between CSV and JSON formats instantly. Handles quoted fields.
- QR Code Generator: Generate QR codes for any URL or text. Choose size, colors, error correction. Download PNG or SVG.
- Cron Expression Generator: Build cron expressions from dropdowns and presets. See the next 5 run times before you commit.
- Protobuf Decoder: Decode protobuf binary data (hex or base64) into a readable tree structure showing field numbers, wire types, and values.
- .gitignore Generator: Pick languages, frameworks and tools to combine matching templates from github/gitignore into a single .gitignore file. Add your own rules or download the result.
- Codebase Context Packer: Drop a local folder, get a single Markdown file with all source code contents — ready to paste into a ChatGPT, Claude or Gemini prompt. Binary files are skipped. Runs in the browser, nothing uploaded.
- Token Counter: Estimate how many tokens your prompt uses for OpenAI GPT-5/4o/o-series, Anthropic Claude (Opus 4.8, Sonnet 5, Fable 5, Mythos 5, Haiku 4), and Google Gemini 2.x. Based on publicly documented chars-per-token ratios — not an exact count. Works in the browser, nothing is uploaded.

### Converters
- Unit Converter: Convert length (miles, km, meters, feet), weight (kg, lbs, grams, ounces) and temperature (Celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin).

### Security & Privacy
- Password Generator: Generate strong random passwords with configurable length and character sets using crypto.getRandomValues.
- Hash Generator: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256 and SHA-512 hashes from any text.
- HMAC Generator: Generate HMAC-SHA256 and HMAC-SHA512 signatures from a message and secret key.

### AI & Prompting
- Token Counter: Estimate how many tokens your prompt uses for OpenAI GPT-5/4o/o-series, Anthropic Claude (Opus 4.8, Sonnet 5, Fable 5, Mythos 5, Haiku 4), and Google Gemini 2.x. Based on publicly documented chars-per-token ratios — not an exact count. Works in the browser, nothing is uploaded.
- Codebase Context Packer: Drop a local folder, get a single Markdown file with all source code contents — ready to paste into a ChatGPT, Claude or Gemini prompt. Binary files are skipped. Runs in the browser, nothing uploaded.

## How it works

Everything runs locally in your browser. No cookies, no analytics, no tracking. The site is hosted on GitHub Pages and the source code is open.

## Contact

Report bugs or request features at https://github.com/Aibotflix/tools/issues
